query:
-- Find RVC ICT Consulting customer
SELECT externalId, name, businessName, contactEmail, siteAddress, status
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%RVC%' OR name LIKE '%Ian Donald%' OR businessName LIKE '%RVC%' OR name LIKE '%North Lakes%'
ORDER BY name LIMIT 10;

-- Find the two NBN services by service ID / AVC
SELECT id, externalId, serviceType, provider, planName, avcId, address, simSerial, status, customerExternalId, monthlyCost
FROM services 
WHERE externalId IN ('13207099', '13300275') 
   OR avcId IN ('AVC400045874456', 'AVC400045874456')
   OR (address LIKE '%Keperra%' AND serviceType LIKE '%NBN%')
   OR (address LIKE '%North Lakes%' AND serviceType LIKE '%NBN%')
LIMIT 10;
